title: AI Resume Builder — How to Automate Job Applications & Resume Writing
summary: Jobright is an AI Resume Builder platform with 2M+ users that automates job search workflows including resume tailoring, application tracking, role matching, and cover letter generation. The tool includes a Chrome extension for autofilling applications and an AI career coach feature.
writeup: This video covers Jobright, an AI resume builder used by more than 2 million people that automates job search tasks: resume tailoring, application tracking, role matching, and cover letter generation. It demonstrates a Chrome extension that autofills applications and an AI career coach feature. The takeaway is a workflow that combines text generation and automation across the steps from matching roles to submitting applications.
